title: Preview Table Command Deck
concept: A preview-protecting command deck where an admin-style table drives Playground objects, launch routes, Site Manager tools, Blueprint gallery entries, and transfer history while a selected-detail panel and large live WordPress shell remain persistent.
focus: browser, local, imported, exported, and temporary row states
flows: Finish settings Save & Reload from a stored Playground by changing WordPress/PHP/language/network options, showing stored reload behavior, progressing through reload, and updating runtime badges, active row, preview state, and transfer history.
Show the unsaved settings reset consequence for temporary Playgrounds with destructive warning copy and a completed reset result that remains temporary.
Delete a saved Playground end to end with warning, cancel path, confirm, progress state, final row removal, transfer history, and active-site fallback to the unsaved Playground.

Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, local folder permission, progress, transformed row state, shell identity update, and reload consequences.
Use distinct start routes for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with session-only token warning, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with replacement confirmation.
Use Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions from table rows without hiding the live preview.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview
Gutenberg PR or branch preview
GitHub import with account connection and token persistence caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing, validation, replacement warning, progress, and imported result
Blueprint gallery categories and search with an honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Visible save progress state
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, imported, and exported Playground row states
Open/manage, rename framing, delete confirmation, cancel, progress, final row removal, and active fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved browser, local-directory, and imported storage badges
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive unsaved reset and stored Save & Reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected wp-config.php editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with Blueprint URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, run, warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning and empty states
Export to GitHub
Download active Playground as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history for saves, settings reloads, resets, imports, exports, downloads, file edits, Blueprint runs, deletes, and path navigation
